retry_reason: of_node_put is a void function that always succeeds; there is no failure path to retry.
contract_summary: This function is a put wrapper that releases all device_node references stored in the wsi_node array of the ath12k_hw_group. After calling this function, the caller must not use any of the previously stored wsi_node pointers, as they have been put and set to NULL. The num_devices counter is reset to 0 to mark the array as empty. This is typically used during cleanup or teardown, ensuring that device tree node references are properly released and no double-put occurs. The function does not return a value and requires no checking from the caller.
